data.content: Approved in implementation review. Verified POST /api/beats now creates the beat before asynchronously calling enqueueBeatScopeRefinement, preserves the 201 response when enqueueing fails, and forwards repoPath into the queue hook. The route-level test coverage exercises the real handler for successful enqueue, repoPath forwarding, creation failure, and enqueue failure resilience. Sanity gates passed in work/foolery-d984: bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
